name: Algolia
description: Developer of a search and discovery application programming interface platform designed to create fast, instant, and relevant search and discovery experiences. The company's platform provides the infrastructure, engine, and tools needed to create fast, relevant consumer-grade search, enabling developers to easily integrate it into websites and applications and drive consumer engagement.

name: Artiphon
description: Developer of digital musical device designed to make musical expression ubiquitous and accessible to all. The company's device help to create songs with intuitive gestures like tapping, sliding, and waving, has a built-in speaker, and can switch between guitar, violin, piano, and drums at the press of a button, enabling users to have a digital instrument that adapts to the way they play.

name: Audiodraft
description: Developer of an online audio branding platform designed to outsource audio productions to a network of musicians and sound designers. The company's platform offers custom-made music and sound design for television commercials, theme music for mobile games, and audio logos for companies, enabling clients to create open sound design contests, where sound designers compete and audio content can be bought for various media use.

name: Bustle
description: Developer of a digital media platform designed for young readers. The company's platform delivers everything readers want to read, including news, celebrity, culture, lifestyle, politics, fashion and beauty, enabling readers and social fans to get everything they need to know in one place and stay updated on all the things they love.

name: Boletia
description: Developer of an event management platform designed to help event organizers to sell their tickets. The company's platform offers conference management including accreditation, registration, collection, and selling of tickets, enabling event organizers to sell tickets through local convenience stores, which is a popular way of purchasing tickets.

name: Bounty Hunter
description: Operator of a creative competition platform intended for brands to run creative contests. The company's platform is a channel for creative people to realize and chase their dreams by, enabling creative people with the opportunity to show their success, let themselves shine through the competition, and at the same time provide a complete portfolio so that creators can put their creative works on and share with each other, and learn and grow.

name: Boxc
description: Developer of an e-commerce logistics management platform designed to eliminate the limitations of standard shipping and logistics solutions. The company's platform leverages the existing and underutilized infrastructure and provides all the tools for international e-commerce logistics management in a single platform, enabling logistics companies and e-commerce retailers to build their own international shipping solutions.

name: Breather
description: Developer of an online real estate platform intended to provide office and workspaces on rent. The company's platform provides office spaces by the hour, day or week which are fully equipped for meetings that help users to host video conferences and stay connected, enabling businesses and corporate clients to get spaces as per their requirements that help them improve their operations.

name: Carousell
description: Operator of an online platform intended to simplify the process of buying and selling. The company's marketplace offers person-to-person buying and selling of products such as fashion items, home and living, mobile, and electronics among others simply by snapping a photo and posting a description of unused and secondhand clutter easily with free listings, enabling users to enjoy discounts and discover savings as well as save time and money.

name: Carreira Beauty
description: Operator of an online B2B marketplace platform intended to cater services to beauty professionals and salons in Brazil. The company's platform provides services like career development and digital presence, enabling companies in the sector of beauty and well-being to find opportunities and gain more knowledge.

name: Clip
description: Developer of a digital payment platform designed to help businesses increase sales and grow their business. The company's platform offers an application that lets businesses accept payments with all credit and debit cards, contactless technology and Samsung Pay without complicated paperwork, monthly fees or minimal sales, enabling customers to pay anytime at their fingertips and businesses to accept payments easily.

name: Conekta
description: Developer of an online payment platform designed to secure and optimize bank processes. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence to integrate the application programming interface to process online and offline payments and analyze the transaction behavior to identify fraudulent purchases while certified secure banking services encrypt and protect banking and financial information, enabling businesses to accept online payments through cards, cash or bank transfers in a simple and safe manner.

name: Cuponomia
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to discover and share coupon codes. The company's platform gathers coupons that can be used during online shopping, helps to save money and gains benefits every time one makes a purchase over the Internet, enabling shoppers to avail desired discounts and cashbacks on their favorite products.

name: EquityZen
description: Developer of an investment marketplace designed to connect shareholders of private companies seeking liquidity with accredited investors seeking private market access. The company's marketplace makes buying and selling shares in private companies easy, enabling clients to have the opportunity to invest in large private firms and address liquidity and risk concerns.

name: Goldbely
description: Operator of a specialty food online marketplace intended to make local, artisan products available to anyone and anywhere. The company offers logistics, providing the boxes and cold packs for shipping orders and helping restaurants ship directly from their premises, with tools for ordering and doorstep delivery, enabling small businesses to reach new customers and grow their revenue.

name: ARG
description: Operator of a social e-commerce site for action sports based in San Francisco, California. The company provides its community with a curated selection of established and upcoming outdoor lifestyle brands.

name: Greentoe
description: Operator of an online shopping platform designed to facilitate people to set their own prices on appliances. The company's platform is an e-commerce negotiation website that offers various products directly from a network of certified retailers, enabling users to pay the price they want to pay for the electronics they want to buy.

name: Hacker Earth
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-powered assessment platform intended to help large enterprises evaluate developers based on specific skills. The company's platform helps recruiters to identify and hire appropriate candidates from its community of developers and offers a skill assessment tool to computer programmers and endorses their capabilities through certifications, enabling recruiters to find the right candidate for technical jobs and also assess them.

name: Makeably
description: Operator of an educational platform intended to create classroom services that have a lasting impact on the lives of children. The company's educational platform develops thoughtful, innovative early learning services and fuelled by research that engages early learners with interactive experiences, objectively assesses skills in seven domains of development and individualizes learning, enabling teachers with data and curricular experiences to fuel the success of every child.

name: HeartThis
description: Provider of an online shopping platform. The company provides users with an online platform to purchase goods and accessories of various brands, with home delivery.

name: HomeLight
description: Operator of an online real estate marketplace intended to make real estate transactions simple, certain, and satisfying for all. The company's platform delivers outcomes to homebuyers and sellers during every step of the real estate journey such as helping an all-cash offer, unlocking liquidity of their existing home to buy a new one, or creating certainty through a modern closing process, enabling customers to buy or sell their properties.

name: Iterable
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-powered customer communication platform intended to help organizations activate customers with joyful interactions at scale. The company's platform offers user engagement campaigns throughout the full lifecycle, using contextual and behavior-driven data, proprietary algorithms, and artificial intelligence (AI) to determine the time for customer engagement and conversion, enabling marketers to safely send campaigns without risking channel fatigue.

name: Likeable Local
description: Provider of social advertising services intended to automate social media for businesses. The company offers integrated software services for small businesses to create, enhance, and manage their social media presence through custom content creation, targeted media advertising, and an updated content library, enabling businesses to save time and resources and measure their growth.

name: Mayvenn
description: Retailer of online hair care products intended to provide quality beauty products with an unparalleled shopping experience. The company's services offer tools to hair stylists to sell hair extensions directly to their clients without the burden of upfront costs and holding inventory, allowing customers to shop in a dignified way while receiving related products and services.

name: CopThis
description: Operator of an online retail marketplace intended to sell music band merchandise. The company's marketplace allows fans to discover and buy merchandise such as clothes, accessories, bags, digital video discs, and vinyl from their favorite music artists, enabling fans to buy their desired accessories and merchandise at a reasonable price range.

name: MicroBenefits
description: Provider of a mobile application designed to offer employee retention and corporate training services. The company's application creates opportunity for employees while improving operational efficiency and employee productivity, enabling businesses to retain their employees and improving its performance.

name: Moj.io
description: Developer of a modular SaaS platform designed to build, launch, and scale connected mobility services. The company's platform, applications, and services deliver a smarter, safer, and more convenient car ownership experience for the global driving community and offer GPS fleet tracking solutions for small businesses that rely on their vehicles to get the job done, providing individuals and businesses with scalable, secure and hardware-agnostic connected mobility services.

name: Novus Via
description: Developer of a cloud-based sales management platform designed to convert the complexity of customer relationship management into an achievable to-do list. The company's platform processes daily actions for various businesses and users, as well as offers products by email without requiring formal administration personnel, enabling clients to convert leads to customers and reach targets to grow their business.

name: Pantry
description: Provider of refrigerated vending kiosks for the food-service market. The company provides instant access to fresh food through a network of swipe, grab and go kiosks. Its local food partners curate a seasonal menu of fresh meals, snacks and beverages for the kiosks. The company deploys its kiosks across the US to workplaces, hospitals, universities and hotels.

name: Qraved
description: Operator of a restaurant review and booking platform intended to help people find restaurants in Indonesia. The company's platform offers user-generated reviews, ratings and photos along with recommendations and promo offers at any participating restaurant, enabling culinary connoisseurs and travelers to find interesting restaurants and events and make hassle-free reservations and earn dining points.

name: Reddit
description: Reddit Inc is engaged in providing internet content. The company provides online services that include gaming, sports, business, crypto, television and others.

name: Nova Lima
description: Developer of team management software designed to increase the productivity of employees while working as a team. The company's software offers a work collaboration interface that assists managers in organizing and managing their tasks, time, costs, workflow, and talent, enabling clients to increase profitability and reduce operational costs.

name: KartRocket
description: Developer of an e-commerce shipping and enablement application designed to offer negotiated freight rates. The company's platform employs a machine-learning-based data engine that recommends proper courier service for a business and chooses a courier company, prints shipping labels, and tracks orders from a single panel, enabling businesses to manage their shipping and returns simply and effectively.

name: Shopeando
description: Provider of logistics services intended to simplify buying products directly from big Chinese e-commerce websites. The company's services offer delivery services of personal and business import products directly to the customer's doorsteps, enabling customers to get their desired products at the right time and place.

name: Sightly
description: Developer of a video campaign analyzing platform designed to maximize the reach and effectiveness of video advertising. The company's platform offers software tools for audience targeting, campaign workflow, advertisement personalization, campaign automation, and an intelligent optimization engine, enabling clients to ensure fraud protection that helps them to reach their precise audience, as well as customers outside their current target.

name: Silveredge
description: Operator of an advertising platform intended to offer data-driven technologies to complex client problems. The company's platform focuses on developing proprietary metrics around advanced computer vision capabilities that can be applied to new use cases in the media industry, enabling brands to discover their most relevant audience through context-relevant video ad placement targeting, in a fully controlled and brand-safe environment.

name: SnapUp
description: Developer of a mobile application designed to track and shop products. The company's mobile application automatically identifies and recognizes the products saved as screenshots in mobiles camera roll, enabling users to move those products into lists, keep track of sales and other deals and then finally buy when the price is right.

name: Tamatem
description: Developer of localized versions of mobile games designed to serve games tailored to the language and culture of the region. The company's mobile games are published with partners from international studios and developers taking their games and making them culturally relevant for the Arabic gamer, enabling users to optimize and monetize their games.

name: ViralGains
description: Developer of a marketing platform designed to improve advertising experiences for brands and consumers. The company's platform measures how consumers watch, share and talk about video content, enabling marketers to engage people with relevant brand stories in the venues and contexts that people favor.

name: Voi
description: Operator of behavioral health and insights platform designed to help and intervene in people at risk of suicide and mental issues. The company's artificial Intelligence-powered platform provides feedback about imminent suicide risk in order for users to take the required action, enabling health professionals, hospitals, and families to assess risk as highly trained psychiatrists and provide detailed insights about the patient population.

name: VTS
description: Developer of a leasing and asset management platform designed to help commercial real estate professionals. The company's platform offers one place to track all of their leases, assets and tenants as well as allows them to create custom alerts and reporting capabilities that provide critical insights, enabling office, retail, and industrial landlords and brokers to transform their leasing process and convert leads to leases efficiently.

name: Wedgies
description: Provider of a real-time polling platform designed to aggregate data and initiate interaction through survey questions. The company's platform operates an online tool that works everywhere like tablet, mobile and desktop, enabling users to create, conduct and share surveys. It offers a survey tool for publishers and media outlets.

name: Wevorce
description: Provider of divorce handling services intended to help couples and families get through their divorce. The company's services include assisting couples through the six broad steps of divorce planning, co-parent planning, financial agreements and divorce settlement, enabling clients to have access to lawyers, counselors and financial professionals when they need it throughout the divorce process.

name: Whill
description: Developer of an intelligent personal electric vehicle designed to deliver fun and innovative mobility for all. The company connects the world with personal transportation solutions, in addition to designing and selling mobility vehicles it provides mobility-as-a-service, offering autonomous transportation services as well as on-site fleet and short-term rental services that make public spaces such as airports, hospitals, and vacation destinations more accessible, enabling customers to drive on public roads without the need for a driver's license and empowering wheelchair users to lead a liberating lifestyle.

name: Wideo
description: Developer of an online animated video creation platform designed to empower people to create professional online videos. The company's platform provides flexibility beyond templates and themes and offers a selection of templates that can be customized to deliver a message or create one from scratch, enabling users to create, edit and share unique professional videos in order to elevate their online marketing strategy faster and easier.

name: Shortcut
description: Developer of an online platform for wholesalers to manage online orders. The company provides a platform that enables any wholesaler to manage B2B transactions, inventory and create digital catalogs.

name: Wishbird Experiences
description: Developer of an online marketplace designed to offer gift items to the people. The company's online marketplace offers activity gifts online like diving, paragliding, rafting, hot air balloon flights, exclusive spas and many more for women and men, enabling clients to increase engagement and loyalty with their stakeholders.

name: Pokkt
description: Provider of a mobile video advertising platform intended to serve the application developers and publishers. The company's platform offers to make free purchases through multiple alternative monetization tools such as watching videos, subscribing to services, installing applications and participation in surveys, enabling clients to get connected with the right audiences.

name: WAH Holidays
description: Provider of an online travel search engine designed to seamlessly plan and book holidays. The company's online travel search engine is a platform that offers off-beat or popular destinations, honeymoon packages, family vacations, weekend trips and other getaway destinations, enabling users to search and book travel destinations, holiday packages, flights and hotels online.

name: Little Eye
description: Developer of analysis software for developers and testers of Android applications. The company provides a performance-analysis platform enabling developers to measure, analyze and optimize Android apps. The platform generates performance reports and does not require setup or coding - users plug their device in and begin profiling.

name: Milk and Honey
description: Operator of a women's footwear brand. The company allows women to design their own footwear online from the various designs offered that includes platform pumps, stilettos, pumps, flats, oxford heels, oxford flats, wedges, platform wedges, wedges, boots, moto boots, booties, ankle boots, platform sandals, sandals and flat sandals.

name: Iconfinder
description: Provider of an icon search engine designed to offer customized icon design. The company's icon search engine gives access to a library of icons through subscription, enabling web designers and developers to use graphical computer icons.

name: LE TOTE
description: Operator of an online clothing rental platform designed to help in borrowing everyday clothing. The company's clothing rental platform focuses on replicating the offline behavior of swapping and sharing clothes, enabling consumers to borrow clothing and accessories through an online portal.

name: Sunrise Atelier
description: Provider of a free calender application for mobile devices. The company has developed a mobile application that is made for Google Calendar users, providing real-time synchronization, quick-add event tools, time-zone support and Facebook events and birthdays.

name: LeadGenius
description: Developer of an end-to-end sales software designed to offer lead data at scale to organizations. The company's software helps data experts to conduct ongoing research to automatically supply teams with accurate contact information and hard-to-acquire data points, enabling clients to generate high lead value and promote sales for their organization.

name: ShopGo
description: Provider of software platform designed to create e-commerce Websites. The company's software platform provides local support to its merchants and their changing needs at every stage, enabling merchants to succeed in their online business.

name: BoomTrain
description: Provider of an artificial intelligence marketing platform designed to make marketing valuable for businesses and consumers. The company's artificial intelligence marketing platform drives relevant interactions with users through analysis of billions of data points that offer single uniﬁed view of each customer, enabling clients to understand and communicate with their customers on an individual level, at any scale.

name: Populr.me
description: Provider of an online publishing platform to create & share single Web pages. The company has developed a visual editor with a drag & drop interface where users can create one-pagers with media such as text, images, video recordings, files, embeddable services with YouTube, JotForm and SlideShare.

name: AdEspresso
description: Developer of a SaaS platform designed to make Facebook advertising easy and profitable for small and medium businesses. The company has developed a SaaS platform to create A-B test and post advertisements on Facebook and Instagram, helping companies to create and optimize an advertising campaign.

name: CE 140
description: Provider of database intended to help businesses discover, buy and use software. The company's database provides a platform for people to share information on productivity products and find what others are using, enabling companies to better discover software they should buy, with recommendations based on their current stack and what similar companies are using.

name: PlateJoy
description: Provider of online platform intended to offer personalized nutrition plan and grocery list guides. The company's online platform offers information on customized shopping lists and simple recipes, enabling users maintain a healthy diet for weight loss and dietary improvements inspite of their busy schedule.

name: SambaAds
description: Provider of a video distribution network platform intended to recommend videos for publishers and websites. The company's video distribution network platform includes media buyers access to video views on local (Brazilian) premium publishers in the form of standard and interactive formats, enabling users to produce videos and inke to any type of content produced.

name: Geekatoo
description: Operator of an online marketplace for computer technicians. The company develops an online application which gathers bids from technicians in customer's local areas to fix their computer problems.

name: TouristEye
description: Provider of platform for trip planner. The company allows to plan trip on the website and view all the information and maps offline on mobile device.

name: BetterDoctor
description: Provider of a healthcare provider data platform designed to improve the flow and quality of healthcare data so that patients can get the care they need when required. The company's doctor searching platform offers a web and mobile application that helps to validate and deliver accurate provider data of health plans, health systems and other doctor related data, enabling patients to find all health related information at one place.

name: Pick1
description: Provider of a database and market research platform designed to create seamless, highly engaging polls and complex surveys. The company's platform offers a survey and social analytics tool, enabling companies to create engaging polls and complex surveys. It also gives users the capability to get social data, customer insight and behavioral analytics from social networking sites.

name: Storefront
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to help people to rent short term retail space. The company's marketplace connects retailers, brands and designers with their customers through short-term retail stores, also known as pop-up shops, as well as helps realtors and space owners to list their property on the site and name their price and approve all bookings, enabling clients to benefit from each other and grow in terms of revenue.

name: Zapr
description: Developer of digital signal processing and big data analytics software designed to drive unparalleled media insights & targeted TV to mobile audience engagement. The company's digital signal processing and big data analytics software tracks the offline behavior of their customers enabling them to identify and engage with viewers using a gamified approach, enabling brands and media businesses to market better.

name: ZippyKid
description: Provider of WordPress hosting services designed to make WordPress hosting easy, fast and reliable at scale. The company's WordPress hosting services provides automatic update, traffic scaling, nightly backups and responsive support enabling companies to share branded content and deliver engaging online shopping experiences to its users.

name: Playcez
description: Provider of a local event discovery platform. The company's platform monitors social media and location check-in activity in an area and recommends popular events and activities to users by identifying locations like bars, restaurants, night clubs, among others in that area.

name: WalkerCo
description: Manufacturer of health and beauty products intended to build the consumer-centric health and beauty product to inspire consumer loyalty. The company's health and beauty products includes moisturizing shave and hair care collection that help reduce shaving irritation and razor bumps and the products are thoroughly coactive, formulations actively work together, enabling users to get keep their skin and hair happy and to help their hair feel healthier.

name: VLTA
description: Provider of electric vehicle charging stations intended to make communities more sustainable. The company's vehicle charging stations partners with brands to sponsor free charging for all electric vehicle drivers for free, enabling brands to meet consumers at the optimal moment of purchase decision.

name: Sverve
description: Provider of a self-service influencer marketing platform for small businesses. The company provides a technology to manage and track social media influencer campaigns all at one place. It builds deep profiles of influencers, capturing their reach, topics, demographics and retailer affinities along with our proprietary performance metrics. It also help brands connect and work with the right influencers, enable automated payments, and track cross-channel results of their campaigns.

name: postcron
description: Developer of a tool designed to allow brands to build and run any kind of promotion. The company's tool allows companies to easily install raffles, image contests and a collection of more than 20 applications on their Fan Page, enabling agencies and marketers to attract more fans, increase interaction with their audience and boost the company's sales through From Facebook.

name: Eventup
description: Developer of an online cross-city event venue searching platform designed to connect property owners and clients directly. The company's online platform offers an online marketplace for thousands of event venues across the U.S. including galleries, lofts, warehouses, banquet halls, rooftop bars and conference centers, enabling restaurants and other venues operators to streamline their event sales and management workflow, from initial inquiry through day-of execution, simplifying event planning for venues and their customers.

name: Greply
description: Developer of an on-demand communication and collaboration tool for home service professionals. The company's mobile application delivers a combination of augmented reality (AR), computer vision, and machine learning in order to capture information such as brand model, serial number, measurements and angles, and also allows for saving notes and images through a digital toolbox and record, enabling home management professionals including plumbers, painters and electricians to provide remote support, spend less time on the road and have happier customers.

name: Skygiraffe
description: Developer of an enterprise-grade mobility platform designed to mobilize line-of-business applications. The company's platform helps businesses to deploy enterprise-grade mobile applications on any device immediately and without the need for writing code, enabling employees to read and write-back data through customized mobile business applications.

name: PopApp
description: Developer of an application prototyping tool designed to assist users with various technological concepts. The company's application prototyping tool offers a platform to application developers to share their ideas and communicate with users to demonstrate how it works on a smartphone, enabling users to get technical guidance.

name: OLSET
description: Provider of Information as a Service (IaaS) based hotel reservation software designed to offer new and innovative hotel booking technologies. The company's hotel reservation software uses technology to expedite the booking process and increase conversions for travel industry partners by analyzing millions of reviews and tailoring results based on a consumer's interests, enabling clients to avail increased profits.

name: Dropsuite
description: Provider of a cloud-based software platform designed to help businesses to backup, recover and protect their important business information. The company's cloud-based software platform offer services that include website and database backup, email backup and email archiving, enabling small and medium enterprises to restore and backup all their important data in a secured cloud storage.

name: Wiser
description: Provider of actionable data intended to make better decisions for users. Wiser collects and analyzes online and in-store data with peed, scale and accuracy. The Wiser platform then blends these insights with advanced workflow software to drive business value for brands and retailers, including restaurants. The company's platform utilizes a combination of data science and human validation and offers integrated solutions for every aspect of retail in a centralized location.

name: PriceBaba
description: Provider of price comparison service. The company attempts to connect mobile phone buyers directly with mobile shops in their vicinity and compares prices and specs of mobile phones.

name: FIGS
description: Manufacturer and seller of antimicrobial and wrinkle-free medical uniforms. The company's medical apparel is antimicrobial, wrinkle resistant, stain repellant, lint free and utilizes four-way stretch and is sold online via its customer-centric, vertically integrated ecommerce platform, enabling the customers to order medical apparel in different sizes and as per convenience.

name: AutoChilango
description: Provider of legal and bureaucracy assistance for cars. The company engages in development of a mobile phone application that provides traffic alerts, insurance management and other vital information that helps people to manage everything that is necessary with having a car in Mexico City.

name: TRDATA
description: Provider of global institutional investment network. The company collects market information from remote places from scattered and illiquid markets and presents that information to the customer in an accessible platform.

name: Admission Table
description: Developer of a mobile based social recruitment application for universities. The company enables universities to find prospective international students, engage with them and recruit them for graduate and undergraduate programs.

name: Kinnek
description: Operator of an online marketplace for high-cost purchases designed to find suppliers and manage purchasing. The company's online marketplace for high-cost purchases offers a curated way to research equipment or supplies, enabling businesses to seamlessly connect with suppliers.

name: Divshot
description: Provider of a browser-based, front-end development platform for responsive web applications. The company has developed a web application interface for designing webpages and exporting them to HTML5/CSS3.

name: Clothes Horse
description: Provider of online data-driven platform to help consumers to shop for clothing. The company provides a data-driven recommendations tool that recommends the best fitting clothes based on a shopper's body size and favorite past purchases.

name: Semeantoja
description: Provider of a culinary search engine in Latin America. The company provides a search engine which offers a marketing platform for restaurateurs and allows users to search for a restaurant based on various parameters.

name: Boxbee
description: Developer of an on-demand storage box delivery software designed to oversee logistically complex operations. The company's on-demand storage box delivery software helps customers to manage and retrieve their boxes online, enabling full service storage companies up and running.

name: Dsco
description: Provider of a cloud-based drop-shipping platform designed to provide product push and predictive supply chain, models. The company's online platform integrates and manages drop ship partners, inventory, data, and orders by handling the exchange of data through a single connection and integration point, helping trading partners streamline operations, generate more sales, and fulfill more orders using the virtual supply chain.

name: Binpress
description: Provider of a marketplace for commercial open-source. The company provides a platform for software developers to monetize their open-source projects and to build sustainable business around them.

name: Reesio
description: Provider of a platform that focuses on real estate transaction process. The company has developed a platform which enables its users to share real estate documents and manage property showings, offers, messages and document storage.

name: Wittlebee
description: Provider of online kids apparel. The company provides basics like onesies, t-shirts, socks and leggings. It also creates custom packages for its members based on their child's age, color preferences and geographic location.

name: Epic!
description: Provider of an online book subscription service intended to offer unlimited access to over 20,000 high-quality books. The company's online book subscription service include curated of read-to-me, audio books and educational videos, enabling children aged 12 and under to instantly discover contents of their interest, read them and share with friends.
